name: ethereum-types

metadata.name: ethereum-types
classifiers: License :: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication
metadata.summary: Types used by the Ethereum Specification.

documentation:
Ethereum Types
==============

Types and utilities used by the [Ethereum Execution Layer Specification (EELS)][eels]. Includes:

- Fixed-size unsigned integers (`U256`, `U64`, etc.)
- Arbitrarily-sized unsigned integers (`Uint`.)
- Fixed-size byte sequences (`Bytes4`, `Bytes8`, etc.)
- Utilities for making/interacting with immutable dataclasses (`slotted_freezable`, `modify`.)

[eels]: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs

modules.name: ethereum_types.frozen
documentation: Dataclass extension that supports immutability.

functions.name: ethereum_types.frozen.slotted_freezable
documentation:
Monkey patches a dataclass so it can be frozen by setting `_frozen` to
`True` and uses `__slots__` for efficiency.

Instances will be created frozen by default unless you pass `_frozen=False`
to `__init__`.

functions.name: ethereum_types.frozen.modify
documentation:
Create a copy of `obj` (which must be [`@slotted_freezable`]), and modify
it by applying `f`. The returned copy will be frozen.

[`@slotted_freezable`]: ref:ethereum_types.frozen.slotted_freezable

classes.name: ethereum_types.frozen.SlottedFreezable
documentation:
A [`Protocol`] implemented by data classes annotated with
[`@slotted_freezable`].

[`@slotted_freezable`]: ref:ethereum_types.frozen.slotted_freezable
[`Protocol`]: https://docs.python.org/library/typing.html#typing.Protocol

modules.name: ethereum_types
documentation:
Integer and array types which are used by—but not unique to—Ethereum.

[`Uint`] represents non-negative integers of arbitrary size, while subclasses
of [`FixedUnsigned`] (like [`U256`] or [`U32`]) represent non-negative integers
of particular sizes.

Similarly, [`Bytes`] represents arbitrarily long byte sequences, while
subclasses of [`FixedBytes`] (like [`Bytes0`] or [`Bytes64`]) represent
sequences containing an exact number of bytes.

[`Uint`]: ref:ethereum_types.numeric.Uint
[`FixedUnsigned`]: ref:ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned
[`U32`]: ref:ethereum_types.numeric.U32
[`U256`]: ref:ethereum_types.numeric.U256
[`Bytes`]: ref:ethereum_types.bytes.Bytes
[`FixedBytes`]: ref:ethereum_types.bytes.FixedBytes
[`Bytes0`]: ref:ethereum_types.bytes.Bytes0
[`Bytes64`]: ref:ethereum_types.bytes.Bytes64

documentation: Sequences of 256-bit values.

variables.name: ethereum_types.bytes.Bytes
documentation: Sequence of bytes (octets) of arbitrary length.

Superclass for fixed sized byte arrays. Not intended to be used directly,
but should be subclassed.

modules.name: ethereum_types.numeric
documentation: Numeric types (mostly integers.)

functions.name: ethereum_types.numeric.ulen
documentation: Return the number of items in a container, as a `Uint`.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_be_bytes64
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its big endian representation with
exactly 64 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_be_bytes32
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its big endian representation
with exactly 32 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_bytes1
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into a byte sequence with exactly 1
bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_le_bytes4
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its little endian representation,
with exactly 4 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_be_bytes4
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its big endian representation, with
exactly 4 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_le_bytes8
documentation:
Converts this fixed sized unsigned integer into its little endian
representation, with exactly 8 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_be_bytes8
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its big endian representation, with
exactly 8 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_bytes
documentation: Return an array of bytes representing an integer.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_be_bytes
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its big endian representation,
without padding.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_le_bytes
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its little endian representation,
without padding.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_le_bytes32
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its little endian representation
with exactly 32 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.to_le_bytes64
documentation:
Converts this unsigned integer into its little endian representation
with exactly 64 bytes.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Unsigned.bit_length
documentation: Minimum number of bits required to represent this number in binary.
Base of integer types.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Uint

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Uint.from_be_bytes
documentation:
Converts a sequence of bytes into an arbitrarily sized unsigned integer
from its big endian representation.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.Uint.from_le_bytes
documentation:
Converts a sequence of bytes into an arbitrarily sized unsigned integer
from its little endian representation.
Unsigned integer of arbitrary size.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.from_be_bytes
documentation:
Converts a sequence of bytes into a fixed sized unsigned integer
from its big endian representation.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.from_le_bytes
documentation:
Converts a sequence of bytes into a fixed sized unsigned integer
from its little endian representation.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.from_signed
documentation:
Creates an unsigned integer representing `value` using two's
complement.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.wrapping_add
documentation: Return a new instance containing `self + right (mod N)`.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.wrapping_sub
documentation: Return a new instance containing `self - right (mod N)`.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.wrapping_mul
documentation: Return a new instance containing `self * right (mod N)`.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.wrapping_pow
documentation:
Return a new instance containing `self ** right (mod modulo)`.

If omitted, `modulo` defaults to `Uint(self.MAX_VALUE) + 1`.

methods.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.to_signed
documentation: Decodes a signed integer from its two's complement representation.

class_variables.name: ethereum_types.numeric.FixedUnsigned.MAX_VALUE
documentation: Largest value that can be represented by this integer type.

Superclass for fixed size unsigned integers. Not intended to be used
directly, but rather to be subclassed.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U256

class_variables.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U256.MAX_VALUE
documentation: Largest value that can be represented by this integer type.
Unsigned integer, which can represent `0` to `2 ** 256 - 1`, inclusive.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U8

class_variables.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U8.MAX_VALUE
documentation: Largest value that can be represented by this integer type.

Unsigned positive integer, which can represent `0` to `2 ** 8 - 1`,
inclusive.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U32

class_variables.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U32.MAX_VALUE
documentation: Largest value that can be represented by this integer type.

Unsigned positive integer, which can represent `0` to `2 ** 32 - 1`,
inclusive.

classes.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U64

class_variables.name: ethereum_types.numeric.U64.MAX_VALUE
documentation: Largest value that can be represented by this integer type.

Unsigned positive integer, which can represent `0` to `2 ** 64 - 1`,
inclusive.
